description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a steep gable roof clad in dark shingles. The front facade features a small covered entryway with a white door, flanked by two windows on the ground floor and two above. A modest garden with hedges and a paved walkway leads to the entrance. On one side, there is a balcony with a white railing and an awning, while the rear of the house is enclosed by a white fence, containing a patio area with outdoor furniture. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear, and the house is accented with white trim and a mix of hardscaping and greenery.
description: A two-story brick house with a steep gable roof, white-trimmed windows, a covered entryway, and a fenced rear patio with a balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a small porch, two ground-floor windows, and a garden with hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony with a white railing and awning, as well as the extension of the paved walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced patio area, large glass doors, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain brick wall with two windows and the edge of the front garden.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a small porch, white door, overhang, and flanking windows
